sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Defiance納斯達克100收益目標主動型ETF-QQQT-ETF相關分析
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Defiance Nasdaq 100 Enhanced Income ETF (QQQT), detailing its correlation with numerous other ETFs and investment products. It lists a wide range of ETFs, their tracking indexes, and their correlation coefficients to QQQT. The data aims to help investors understand how QQQT relates to other growth, technology, and income-focused ETFs in the market.

feed.title: Turning Point Brands Stock Has Surged 53%, but One Fund Just Sold $12.5 Million in Shares
feed.summary: Cannell Capital sold 128,224 shares of Turning Point Brands (TPB) in late 2025, valued at an estimated $12.54 million, despite the stock having surged 53% over the past year. This transaction reduced Cannell Capital's holding to 2.73% of its AUM, potentially reflecting a strategy to lock in gains after a strong rally rather than an abandonment of the company's long-term prospects. Turning Point Brands, a diversified consumer products company in the tobacco and alternative smoking sector, continues to show strong performance with increasing net sales and adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: iShares Russell 1000 ETF (NYSE: IWB) - Share Price
feed.summary: This article provides the current share price and performance data for the iShares Russell 1000 ETF (NYSE: IWB). The current share price is $373.15, reflecting a -0.94% movement from its closing price seven days prior. The article includes historical data on share price movements over the current year, last year, and financial years, along with detailed daily share price history.

feed.title: Sutro Biopharma (STRO) GC reports new RSUs, options and tax share withholdings
feed.summary: Sutro Biopharma's Chief Administrative Officer and General Counsel, David Pauling, reported several equity transactions including receiving new awards of 4,200 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) and stock options for 33,600 shares. The report also detailed the vesting and settlement of previously awarded RSUs. Additionally, some common shares were withheld to cover tax obligations related to RSU settlements, which the company clarified do not represent market sales by Pauling.

feed.title: iShares中期市政收益債券主動型ETF-INMU-ETF基本資料
feed.summary: This article provides basic information about the iShares Intermediate Muni Income Active ETF (INMU). It details the ETF's issuer (iShares/BlackRock), its investment style focusing on tax-exempt municipal bonds, key financial metrics like ETF size and yield, and its strategy to maximize tax-free current income by investing primarily in investment-grade municipal bonds.

feed.title: BK Technologies Announces Technology Innovation Center to Expand into New Addressable Markets Totaling $1.2 Billion
feed.summary: BK Technologies Corporation has announced the establishment of a new Technology Innovation Center in South Florida. The center's initial focus is the completion of the BKR 9000, which, combined with the BKR 5000, is expected to enable the company to enter new vertical markets estimated at $1.2 billion. Led by CTO Dr. Branko Avanic, the center aims to leverage leading-edge communication technologies to address challenges faced by public safety professionals.

feed.title: Tennessee Legislation Puts CVS Pharmacy Model And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: Proposed legislation in Tennessee could force the closure of over 100 CVS Pharmacy locations, impacting CVS Health's integrated retail and pharmacy benefit manager (PBM) business model. This development introduces a new operational risk for CVS Health, with potential broader implications for vertically integrated pharmacy and PBM models nationwide. Investors are advised to monitor the company's regional earnings exposure and potential legislative trends in other states.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Weighs Permian Sale As Willow And LNG Shift Cash Outlook
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips is considering selling certain Permian Basin assets, valued around US$2 billion, to streamline its portfolio as it shifts focus from heavy project spending to harvesting cash from LNG and the Willow oil project. This move aims to free up capital, potentially boosting shareholder returns and free cash flow, though it may impact future production outlook. Investors should monitor the execution of the Permian sale, updated production guidance, and progress on the Willow and LNG projects, especially given geopolitical influences on oil prices.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Norfolk Southern (NSC) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern (NSC) has seen significant share price appreciation but appears overvalued according to valuation models. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is 52.5% above its intrinsic value of US$208.41, while its P/E ratio of 24.9x is above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 20.8x, indicating it is expensive relative to its earnings growth profile. Investors are encouraged to use "Narratives" on Simply Wall St to create personalized valuation models.

feed.title: NRG Energy Announces Appointment of Caroline Golin as Chief Growth and Policy Officer
feed.summary: NRG Energy Inc. has appointed Caroline Golin, Ph.D., as its new Chief Growth and Policy Officer. Dr. Golin brings over two decades of experience in energy strategy and market development, and will focus on driving strategic business initiatives to support reliability and affordability, including data center expansion and residential virtual power plant programs. She will also lead NRG’s Government and Regulatory Affairs functions, leveraging her previous experience from Google and Envision Energy Advisors.

feed.title: Wedbush Maintains Outperform on Apple Inc. (AAPL) March 04, 2026
feed.summary: Wedbush reiterated an Outperform rating on Apple Inc. (AAPL) on March 04, 2026, citing that nearly half of recent Mac buyers are new to the platform as a potential upside. Bernstein also maintained an Outperform rating, while UBS kept a Neutral stance. None of the firms issued new price targets, leading to a muted market reaction and reinforcing existing sentiment rather than signaling new catalysts for the stock.

feed.title: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) VP Paul Cunningham Sells 1,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) VP Paul Cunningham sold 1,000 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd at an average price of $297.78, reducing his position by 1.05%. The sale, totaling $297,780, was disclosed in an SEC filing, with Cunningham now owning 94,137 shares. This follows previous sales by Cunningham in February and January, as the company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations and providing positive guidance for Q1 and FY 2026.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Director Madhu Ranganathan Sells 3,131 Shares
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies Director Madhu Ranganathan sold 3,131 shares, reducing her stake by over 25%. This insider selling comes alongside other executives' sales, potentially creating near-term selling pressure. Despite this, Akamai beat Q4 earnings expectations and announced plans to deploy NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs, strengthening its AI and edge computing strategy.

feed.title: James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ:JRVR) Plans $0.01 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ:JRVR) has declared a $0.01 quarterly dividend, payable on March 31st to shareholders of record by March 13th, representing an annualized dividend of $0.04 and a yield of 0.6%. Despite missing recent quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, the dividend is well-covered by earnings with a payout ratio of 3.5%, and analysts project a future payout ratio of 2.2% based on expected earnings of $1.80 per share next year. The stock traded up 4.0% to $6.94, and it currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $6.80.

feed.title: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.40
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International (NYSE:JCI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on April 10th to shareholders of record as of March 16th. This annualized dividend of $1.60 represents a 1.1% yield and is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 37.8%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for the past four years and recently exceeded Q1 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) CAO Sells 955 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Alphabet's Chief Accounting Officer, Amie Thuener O'toole, sold 955 shares of GOOG stock on March 3rd for $284,590, reducing her stake by 8.78%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and declared a $0.21 quarterly dividend. Despite positive AI momentum and analyst upgrades, Alphabet faces risks including a wrongful-death lawsuit related to its Gemini chatbot, Waymo safety probes, and broader macro/geopolitical volatility.

feed.title: Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOGL) CAO Sells $284,590.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Chief Accounting Officer (CAO), Amie Thuener O'Toole, sold 955 shares of GOOGL stock on March 3rd, 2026, for a total of $284,590.00, reducing her ownership by 8.78%. This insider sale comes amidst significant company developments including a settlement with Epic Games regarding Play Store commissions, accelerating AI spending, and ongoing scrutiny over AI governance and Waymo's operations. The article also provides details on Alphabet's financial performance, dividend announcement, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) CEO Sells $4,828,500.00 in Stock
feed.summary: TJX Companies CEO Ernie Herrman sold 30,000 shares of company stock for $4,828,500, reducing his stake by 5.89%. This transaction follows a strong earnings report where TJX beat EPS expectations and saw an 8.5% revenue increase, with analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating and an average price target of $167.55. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.425 per share.

feed.title: Sempra's Vista Pacifico LNG Partnership Terminated
feed.summary: Sempra has cancelled its planned Vista Pacifico LNG project in Mexico due to shifting priorities of both Sempra and its partner. The US LNG developer had been working on the project on Mexico’s West Coast. This termination reflects a change in the strategic focus for the companies involved.

feed.title: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) COO Eugene Noel Sells 41,209 Shares
feed.summary: American Tower (NYSE:AMT) COO Eugene Noel sold 41,209 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd, totaling approximately $7.87 million, which decreased his direct holdings by 58.2%. This sale follows the company's Q4 earnings miss on EPS, though revenue slightly beat estimates, and the company provided FY 2026 EPS guidance. American Tower also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.70, but its dividend payout ratio is noted as high at 126.16%.

feed.title: Jon Miller Sells 11,000 Shares of Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ:AKAM) Stock
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies director Jon Miller sold 11,000 shares of company stock for approximately $1.13 million, reducing his position by 32.5%. This sale, alongside other insider sales, comes even as Akamai announced strong Q4 earnings, positive revenue guidance, and plans to deploy NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs to enhance its AI infrastructure. The article notes both positive sentiment from AI integration and recent earnings beats, balanced by the negative signal from insider selling.

feed.title: William Jacob Savage Sells 7,378 Shares of Disc Medicine (NASDAQ:IRON) Stock
feed.summary: William Jacob Savage, an insider at Disc Medicine (NASDAQ:IRON), sold 7,378 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd at an average price of $65.88, totaling $486,062.64. This transaction reduced his position by 7.97%, and he now holds 85,211 shares valued at over $5.6 million. Following the news, Disc Medicine's stock traded down 5.1% to $61.10, although analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $104.80 despite recent reductions in price objectives from several firms.

feed.title: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) CEO Sells $2,657,941.80 in Stock
feed.summary: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) CEO James Matthew Darden sold 18,318 shares of the company's stock for $2,657,941.80, reducing his ownership by 26.39%. This transaction follows a previous sale of 9,527 shares in late February. The company recently increased its quarterly dividend from $0.27 to $0.33 and provided FY2026 EPS guidance, despite slightly missing Q4 2025 earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Fortinet adds 77,000 square feet while pitching homes near headquarters
feed.summary: Fortinet has expanded its headquarters campus in Sunnyvale by acquiring seven industrial buildings along Kifer Road for an undisclosed amount, adding 77,000 square feet. The cybersecurity firm, with $7 billion in revenue and a $60 billion market cap, continues its growth as it recently purchased multiple Intuitive Surgical properties for $47 million. This expansion supports Fortinet's ongoing development in the region.

feed.title: Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) to Issue $0.13 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.13 per share, payable on April 30th to shareholders of record on March 31st. This results in an annualized dividend of $0.52 and a dividend yield of 0.5%, with a low payout ratio of 13.0%, indicating strong coverage by earnings. The company recently beat quarterly EPS expectations and provided optimistic FY2026 guidance, while analysts have a "Hold" rating on the stock with a consensus target price of $108.22.

feed.title: Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP) Insider Patrick Mcdonie Sells 31,537 Shares
feed.summary: Patrick Mcdonie, an insider at Targa Resources (NYSE:TRGP), sold 31,537 shares of the company's stock on March 2nd for approximately $7.55 million, reducing his position by 9.37%. Targa Resources recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.51 EPS on $4.06 billion in revenue. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share and has an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a consensus target price of $240.79.

feed.title: Jefferies reiterates Buy on Stryker stock, keeps $465 target
feed.summary: Jefferies has reiterated a "Buy" rating on Stryker Corp. (NYSE:SYK) and maintained a $465.00 price target, despite InvestingPro analysis suggesting the stock may be overvalued. The medical technology company's management expressed confidence in its long-term growth, supported by strong fundamentals and a diversified portfolio. Recent news also noted strong Q4 2025 earnings, a dividend increase, and the limited market release of the Mako RPS robotic system.

feed.title: Aptiv Announces Pricing and Upsize of $1.6 Billion Private Offering of Senior Notes by Its Electrical Distribution Systems Spin-Off Subsidiaries, Cyprium Corporation and Cyprium Holdings Luxembourg S.à r.l.
feed.summary: Aptiv announced the pricing and upsize of a $1.6 billion private offering of senior notes by its electrical distribution systems spin-off subsidiaries, Cyprium Corporation and Cyprium Holdings Luxembourg S.à r.l. The offering includes $800 million of 6.125% senior notes due 2031 and $800 million of 6.375% senior notes due 2034, an increase of $100 million from the initial announcement. The proceeds, along with borrowings from new credit facilities, will fund a dividend to Aptiv, with Versigent retaining $400 million for general corporate purposes after the spin-off.

feed.title: Charles Schwab Corporation to Host Institutional Investor Day on March 4, 2026
feed.summary: The Charles Schwab Corporation has announced it will host an Institutional Investor Day on March 4, 2026. This event aims to provide institutional investors with insights into the company's strategic initiatives, financial performance, and long-term objectives. Senior executives will present on key business aspects, including client services, technology, and growth strategies, with further details on the agenda and registration to be disclosed later.

feed.title: Is Walmart Inc. (WMT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Walmart Inc. (WMT) by David J. Waldron, highlighting its strong brand, operational discipline, and wide economic moat despite modest revenue growth. The company's consistent returns on equity and effective capital deployment make it a compelling long-term investment in the consumer staples sector. Walmart also remains a popular stock among hedge funds, with 114 portfolios holding WMT in the latest quarter.

feed.title: Is Texas Instruments Incorporated (TXN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Texas Instruments Incorporated (TXN), highlighting its emergence from a multi-year analog semiconductor down-cycle. The company's strategic focus on analog products, its extensive portfolio, and its transition to 300mm wafer production are presented as key drivers for future growth and margin expansion. Despite temporary free cash flow suppression due to heavy capital expenditure, TXN is expected to become a structurally advantaged compounder with compelling risk/reward for investors.

feed.title: Is Global Payments Inc. (GPN) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Global Payments Inc. (GPN), highlighting its deep undervaluation with a forward P/E of 5.4x and strong free cash flow generation. A significant options trade signals confidence in a recovery, fueled by GPN's 2026 pivot to AI-driven "agentic commerce" and integration synergies expected to boost its bottom line. Despite past depreciation, this move suggests substantial upside potential within the next 18 months, driven by mean reversion and transformative growth initiatives.

feed.title: ISCG Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:ISCG
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the iShares Morningstar Small-Cap Growth ETF (ISCG), covering its fund price, chart, key financial statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and a description of its investment strategy. It also includes frequently asked questions about ETFs and ISCG specifically, along with technical analysis summaries.

feed.title: ResMed CFO Sandercock Sells 1,000 Shares Under Pre-Set Trading Plan
feed.summary: ResMed CFO Brett Sandercock sold 1,000 shares of ResMed common stock for $254.30 each under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale, Sandercock retains 84,495 shares, indicating a continued significant equity stake and alignment with shareholder interests. This transaction is considered routine insider trading and doesn't suggest a change in the company's operational outlook.

feed.title: Clarkston boosts Presurance Holdings (PRHI) stake with stock purchases
feed.summary: Clarkston Companies, a 10% owner of Presurance Holdings, Inc. (PRHI), significantly increased its stake through recent stock purchases. On February 27, 2026, Clarkston acquired 9,065,360 shares of common stock at $1.00 per share, while also having 1,500 shares of Series B preferred stock redeemed by Presurance. Earlier, on December 23, 2025, Clarkston had purchased 1,600 shares of Series C preferred stock for $5,000 per share.

feed.title: Haverty Furniture Companies (NYSE:HVT.A) Dividend Yield, History and Growth
feed.summary: Haverty Furniture Companies (NYSE:HVT.A) currently offers a dividend yield of 5.66% and a total shareholder yield of 7.5%, including a 1.8% buyback yield. The company's dividend payments have been volatile but have increased over the past decade. While its payout ratio (106%) suggests dividends are not well covered by earnings, they are covered by cash flows (64.6%).

feed.title: HRTS Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:HRTS
feed.summary: The HRTS Tema Heart & Health ETF focuses on long-term capital growth by investing in companies combating diabetes, obesity, and cardiovascular diseases, primarily in the US and Europe. Launched on November 21, 2023, the actively managed fund has an expense ratio of 0.18% and an AUM of $54.69 million. It aims to achieve returns by integrating ESG factors with fundamental and quantitative analysis.

feed.title: Arcellx Inc stock hits all-time high at 114.27 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Arcellx Inc (ACLX) stock has reached an all-time high of $114.27, reflecting an 82% surge over the past year and 75% year-to-date, boosting its market cap to $6.67 billion. This comes despite InvestingPro data suggesting the stock is overvalued and in overbought territory. The company is also in the process of being acquired by Gilead Sciences for $7.8 billion, leading several analyst firms to downgrade Arcellx to "Hold" or "Neutral" with price targets around the acquisition offer of $115 per share.

feed.title: Stellar Bancorp (STEL) SEVP Justin Long granted 7,074 stock and PSU shares
feed.summary: Justin M. Long, SEVP, GC & Secretary of Stellar Bancorp, Inc. (STEL), was granted 7,074 shares of common stock and performance share units on March 1, 2026, at no cash cost. These awards are subject to vesting conditions, including continued employment and performance targets. Following these grants, Mr. Long directly holds 54,111 shares of Stellar Bancorp common stock.

feed.title: Intrepid Potash: Q4 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Intrepid Potash Inc. (IPI) reported a Q4 loss of $429,000, translating to 3 cents per share, with adjusted earnings of 49 cents per share. The company posted revenue of $75.9 million for the quarter and adjusted revenue of $62.7 million. For the entire year, Intrepid Potash recorded a profit of $11.2 million, or 85 cents per share, on revenues of $250.1 million.

feed.title: INTREPID POTASH ($IPI) Releases Q4 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: INTREPID POTASH ($IPI) reported its Q4 2025 earnings, posting $0.49 per share, which exceeded analyst estimates of $0.33. However, the company's revenue of $62,680,000 missed expectations of $65,902,500. The article also details recent hedge fund activity in IPI stock and an analyst "Sell" rating issued by UBS.

feed.title: TJX Companies - CEO Ernie Herrman Reports Sale Of 30,000 Shares Of Co's Common Stock At Average Price Of $160.95/Share On March 2 - SEC Filing
feed.summary: Ernie Herrman, CEO of TJX Companies, reported the sale of 30,000 shares of the company's common stock. The transactions occurred on March 2 at an average price of $160.95 per share. This information was disclosed in a recent SEC filing.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean proposes floating dry dock in Panama
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group has proposed building a 130,000-ton floating dry dock in Panama's Chiriquí province, intending to service large cruise and container ships as an alternative to facilities in Asia and North America. Panamanian President José Raúl Mulino has expressed strong support for the project, emphasizing its potential to create 500 to 800 jobs and enhance Panama's position as a maritime hub. The development, planned between 2026 and 2031, prioritizes low-carbon operations and high environmental standards.

feed.title: PHM SEC Filings - Pultegroup 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides a comprehensive resource for Pultegroup (PHM) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K forms, and insider trading information. It details the company's financial condition, operations, and risks, and offers AI-powered summaries of these documents. Recent filings cover executive stock transactions, Q4 2025 earnings releases, insider gifts, and institutional ownership reports by Franklin Resources.

feed.title: NRG Energy Sets Underwriting for 14.3M-Share Secondary; 45-Day Lock-Up and Waiver Adopted
feed.summary: NRG Energy has entered an underwriting agreement for a secondary public offering of 14.3 million shares held by existing stockholders, with underwriters having an option for an additional 2.145 million shares. The company will not receive any proceeds from this sale. In connection with the offering, selling stockholders agreed to a 45-day lock-up on their remaining 8.12 million shares, and NRG waived a prior six-month lock-up to facilitate the resale.

feed.title: Top Stocks to Double Up on Right Now
feed.summary: This article recommends high-yield dividend stocks Realty Income (NYSE: O) and Federal Realty (NYSE: FRT) as stable investments during uncertain market conditions. Realty Income is highlighted for its reliable dividend and large net lease retail portfolio, while Federal Realty is praised for its quality-over-quantity approach to retail properties and its Dividend King status. The author suggests these stocks provide peace of mind through consistent dividend checks, contrasting them with the volatility of the broader market.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Reassess Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) After Its Recent Share Price Strength
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has experienced mixed share price movements, showing gains over three and five years but declines over shorter periods. Valuation analyses suggest the stock is currently overvalued, with both the Excess Returns model and the Price vs. Earnings ratio indicating it trades above its intrinsic value and fair ratio. Investors are encouraged to use narratives for a more comprehensive valuation.

feed.title: Quanta Services Adopts 2026 Performance-Based Incentive Framework
feed.summary: Quanta Services has approved a new performance-based incentive framework for 2026, aligning executive and staff compensation with key financial and operational metrics. The framework includes annual incentives tied to EBITDA, EBITDA margin, and safety, along with long-term incentives based on return on invested capital, earnings per share, and total stockholder return for the 2026–2028 period. This initiative aims to strengthen the company’s pay-for-performance culture and connect employee incentives more closely to profitability, capital efficiency, and shareholder value.

feed.title: News | CoStar World News for March 5
feed.summary: Radisson Hotel Group plans to open up to 50 new co-branded hotels in India over the next decade due to rising tourism demand. The UK Chancellor seeks to protect the national economy from global conflicts, and American investment firm Bain Capital is looking for more real estate opportunities in France after deploying over €1 billion in Europe. TPG Real Estate is set to acquire a large healthcare portfolio in Germany from Northwest Healthcare Properties, while Canadian restaurant owners expect worsening profits due to labor constraints and policy uncertainty, potentially impacting landlords. US banks are showing increased commercial real estate lending growth and a slowdown in delinquencies, signaling positive trends for property markets despite remaining loan stress.

feed.title: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) backer Silver Lake reports Class C share sales
feed.summary: Investment entities associated with Silver Lake, including SL SPV-2, L.P., Silver Lake Partners IV, L.P., and Silver Lake Partners V DE (AIV), L.P., converted Dell Technologies Class B Common Stock into Class C Common Stock on March 2, 2026, and subsequently sold a combined 277,567 Class C shares. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from $146.5375 to $150.5429 per share, but these entities continue to hold significant indirect stakes in Dell. The report also highlights the involvement of Egon Durban, a Co-CEO of Silver Lake Group, L.L.C. and a director of Dell, in connection with these holdings.
